asset.title: L1 Read
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A clean and concise workflow preview demonstrating an AI agent reading a specific financial metric from a table without making modifications.

featureClarity.evidence: The UI clearly highlights the row being read and updates the status at the bottom to reflect the AI's action.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the full sequence from goal definition to execution and completion steps.

visualDesign.evidence: Features a polished dark-mode interface with clean typography and clear visual hierarchy.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the financial spreadsheet and agent execution theme of the platform.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captures realistic UI interactions and step-by-step state changes.

legibility.evidence: Text and numbers are highly legible with strong contrast against the dark background.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly applicable to financial auditing and automated data extraction use cases.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the simple read-only nature of the task without overclaiming capabilities.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch the NodeRoom AI agent locate and read the Net Income variance metric from a financial table without altering any values.
